title: cozytempl Helm values
description: Schema enforced by helm install --dry-run and IDE validators. Every field in values.yaml must have a matching rule here so a typo fails fast instead of rendering a silently-wrong Deployment.

tag.description: Image tag. Empty string falls back to Chart.appVersion.

replicaCount.description: Number of cozytempl replicas. Sessions are cookie-stored, so horizontal scaling works without sticky sessions.

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name used in generated resource names.

fullnameOverride.description: Override the fully qualified release-prefixed resource name.

resources.description: Container resource requests and limits. Freeform to accept any valid k8s resource map.

listenAddr.description: Address the server binds to. Default ':8080' binds all interfaces on port 8080.

authMode.description: Authentication mode. Passthrough forwards OIDC ID tokens to the k8s API; byok uses a per-user uploaded kubeconfig; dev disables auth; impersonation-legacy uses Impersonate headers.

devMode.description: Legacy opt-in for dev mode. Equivalent to authMode=dev and wins when both are set. NEVER enable in production.

internalIssuerURL.description: Optional backend-only issuer URL for token endpoint / JWKS calls. Leave empty to reuse issuerURL for both user-facing redirects and backend token exchange.

sessionSecret.description: 32+ random bytes. Generate with `openssl rand -base64 32`. Required when devMode is false and existingSecret is unset.

existingSecret.description: Name of an existing Secret holding keys `oidc-client-secret` and `session-secret`. If set, the chart skips creating its own Secret.

tracing.description: OpenTelemetry tracing configuration. Leave otlpEndpoint empty to disable tracing entirely; the global TracerProvider stays at its zero-cost default.

otlpEndpoint.description: OTLP collector endpoint, e.g. tempo.observability:4317 (gRPC) or http://tempo:4318 (HTTP).

serviceName.description: service.name attribute on spans. Defaults to 'cozytempl' when empty.

create.description: Render ClusterRole / ClusterRoleBinding / watcher SA according to the active authMode. Disable only if RBAC is wired externally.

enabled.description: Render the cozytempl-watcher ServiceAccount and narrow ClusterRole (list+watch on helmreleases). Automatically skipped in dev mode.
